records.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation at Enterprise Scale: A 2026 Survey
records.summary: arXiv 2606.10123 surveys production RAG systems in 2026, finding vector-DB + hybrid-BM25 architectures dominant and highlighting emerging use of graph-augmented retrieval in regulated verticals.

records.title: Small Language Models for On-Device Agentic Workflows
records.summary: arXiv 2605.04431 demonstrates 3B-parameter models matching 70B baselines on constrained agentic tool-use benchmarks, signaling a shift toward on-device inference for latency-sensitive agents.
